scenario.name: Basic Sipstone UAC
scenario.send:
INVITE sip:[field1]@dnscrash.sbct4.com SIP/2.0 Via:SIP/2.0/UDP 192.168.5.12:5060;branch=z9hG4bK-18640-1-0 From: sip:[field0]@[field2];tag=[call_number] To: sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 INVITE Contact: sip:reddy1@192.168.5.12:5060 Supported: replaces Max-Forwards: 70 Subject: Performance Test User-Agent: Avaya J179 IP Phone 4.0.2.1.3 c81fea85c1d6 User-to-User: 00FA080001001056965CFB;encoding=hex Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=- 1509186683 1 IN IP4 [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP4 [local_ip] b=TIAS:64000 t=0 0 a=avf:avc=n prio=n a=csup:avf-v0 m=audio 41532 RTP/AVP 0 8 101 a=rtpmap:8 PCMU/8000 a=rtpmap:0 PCMA/8000 a=rtpmap:101 telephone-event/8000 a=fmtp:101 0-15 a=ptime:20 a=crypto:1 AES_CM_128_HMAC_SHA1_80 inline:5vVWlunqaoCYOgdVSD6MGAKwer+9buj5zGLZkK+Y UNENCRYPTED_SRTCP

ACK sip:[field1]@dnscrash.sbct4.com SIP/2.0 Via:SIP/2.0/UDP 192.168.5.12:5060;branch=z9hG4bK-18642-1-0 From: sip:[field0]@[field2];tag=[call_number] To: sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port][peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 ACK Contact: sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=TCP Max-Forwards: 70 [routes] Content-Type: application/sdp Subject: Performance Test Content-Length: 0

INVITE sip:[field1]@dnscrash.sbct4.com SIP/2.0 Via:SIP/2.0/UDP 192.168.5.12:5060;branch=z9hG4bK-18641-1-0 From: sip:[field0]@[field2];tag=[call_number] To: sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port][peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 2 INVITE Contact: sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port] Route: <sip:[field1]@dnscrash.sbct4.com;transport=udp;lr;ipcs-line=63291> Supported: replaces Max-Forwards: 70 Subject: Performance Test User-Agent: Avaya J179 IP Phone 4.0.2.1.3 c81fea85c1d6 User-to-User: 00FA080001001056965CFB;encoding=hex Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=- 1509186683 1 IN IP4 [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP4 [local_ip] b=TIAS:64000 t=0 0 a=avf:avc=n prio=n a=csup:avf-v0 m=audio 41532 RTP/AVP 0 8 101 a=rtpmap:8 PCMU/8000 a=rtpmap:0 PCMA/8000 a=rtpmap:101 telephone-event/8000 a=fmtp:101 0-15 a=ptime:20 a=crypto:1 AES_CM_128_HMAC_SHA1_80 inline:5vVWlunqaoCYOgdVSD6MGAKwer+9buj5zGLZkK+Y UNENCRYPTED_SRTCP
